summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 21/09/2024
The ship recycling industry is enduring a challenging phase, marked by weak sentiment and low activity across all major markets. Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The ship recycling industry is enduring a challenging phase, marked by weak sentiment and low activity across all major markets. In India, market
participants are cautious, holding off on offers as prices adjust to reflect current conditions.
